overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit urban street at night. The camera follows the player character as they walk through an intersection and along sidewalks, passing other pedestrians in a dystopian city environment with overpasses, digital billboards, and scattered debris.

events.description: camera circles around two standing characters before moving away
character leaves the overpass area and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: standing near another character then beginning to walk away across the street

notable_agents.action: player character with green hair and tattoos standing on sidewalk
second character in similar outfit standing beside player

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the street above with metal supports
tall street lamp casting bright white illumination
modern high-rise building with illuminated windows
red illuminated signage on distant building facade
scattered cardboard boxes and trash on ground near curb

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete highway overpass at night, the player character stands near another similarly dressed character on a street corner. The camera circles around them before the character begins walking away, leaving the overpass area and heading toward an open intersection with glass towers visible in the distance.

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
camera turns toward pedestrian on corner and approaches them

agents.ego_description: walking across the street intersection toward the opposite corner

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat and face mask walking along the curb

entered.detail: white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
dark colored vehicle driving through the intersection
large industrial concrete building with grid-patterned windows
tall pole with traffic signal lights

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open intersection, walking over white crosswalk lines. A black sedan passes through the intersection as the character approaches the opposite corner where a pedestrian in dark clothing walks along the curb. The surroundings feature industrial concrete buildings and tall street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with debris and digital advertisements

events.description: approaching group of four pedestrians gathered near building entrance
entering area illuminated by bright green digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past scattered debris toward a group of people near a building

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians standing and conversing near metal shutter door

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying green-tinted advertisement with text
closed metal shutter on building facade with horizontal slats
scattered cardboard boxes and debris littering the sidewalk
dark colored car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk littered with cardboard debris, the character approaches a group of pedestrians standing near a building with a closed metal shutter. A large digital billboard casts green light onto the scene as the character moves closer to the group, with wet pavement reflecting the street lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadow of a concrete overpass into a neon-lit urban intersection and along a gritty city sidewalk. It begins by circling the player character and a companion beneath the highway structure before following the character as they walk away toward a wide opening where glass towers loom in the distance. As the character crosses the open intersection over white crosswalk lines, the scene shifts to a more industrial environment featuring tall street lamps and a passing black sedan. The camera then tracks the character along a concrete sidewalk littered with cardboard debris, moving toward a group of pedestrians gathered by a closed metal shutter. Finally, the lighting transforms as a large digital billboard casts a vivid green glow over the wet pavement and surrounding architecture.
